title: Surgeon Vacancy at 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies:
3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies!
